ques: Search for the one-way flight available from Calgary to New York on Jan. 1st with the lowest carbon dioxide emissions.
answer: The one-way flight with the lowest carbon dioxide emissions is the WestJet (Delta) nonstop from Calgary (YYC) to New York (JFK) on Fri, Jan 1, departing 9:50 AM and arriving 3:36 PM (3 hr 46 min), at 222 kg CO₂e (−32% vs. typical), priced from €176.
